author: zfei
description: Retrieve the HTML title of web pages to name external links.

manifest.author: zfei
manifest.description: This plugin retrieves the HTML title to name the unnamed URL link.
manifest.name: URL Namer

name: URL Namer

releases.author: zfei
releases.description:
## Bug Fix

Fixed plugin ID mismatch error that prevented installation from Obsidian community plugin browser.

### Changes
- Reverted plugin ID from `obsidian-url-namer` back to `url-namer` to match registry
- Bumped version to 1.1.1

### Notes
The plugin ID was accidentally changed in v1.1.0, causing installation failures. This release restores compatibility with the Obsidian community plugin registry.

Fixes #4 and #5
releases.name: v1.1.1 - Fix Plugin ID Mismatch

releases.author: zfei
releases.description:
## What's New

Thanks to [mvexel](https://github.com/mvexel) for contributing these improvements:

### New Features
- Auto-name on paste: Optional setting to automatically convert pasted URLs to named links
- Offline support: Graceful fallback when Obsidian is offline
- Improved title extraction: Now supports og:title and twitter:title metadata

### Code Improvements
- Modernized TypeScript code
- Updated build tooling (esbuild, ESLint flat config)
- iOS < 16.4 compatibility (removed lookbehind regex)
- Better handling of trailing punctuation in URLs

### Bug Fixes
- Skip URLs already inside Markdown links
- Proper error handling for failed requests
releases.name: v1.1.0
